paper_metadata.title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct
paper_metadata.abstract: Large language models (LLMs), such as GPT-4, have shown remarkable performance in natural language processing (NLP) tasks, including challenging mathematical reasoning. However, most existing open-source models are only pre-trained on large-scale internet data and without math-related optimization. In this paper, we present WizardMath, which enhances the mathematical CoT reasoning abilities of LLMs without using external python tools, by applying our proposed Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF) method to the domain of math. Through extensive experiments on two mathematical reasoning benchmarks, namely GSM8k and MATH, we reveal the extraordinary capabilities of our model. Remarkably, WizardMath-Mistral 7B surpasses top-tier open-source LLMs by a substantial margin with higher data efficiency. Furthermore, WizardMath 70B even outperforms GPT-3.5-Turbo, Claude 2, Gemini Pro and GPT-4-early-version. Additionally, our preliminary exploration highlights the pivotal role of instruction evolution and process supervision in achieving exceptional math performance. For more details refer to https://github.com/nlpxucan/WizardLM

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF), which combines Math Evol-Instruct, Instruction Reward Model (IRM), and Process-Supervised Reward Model (PRM) to enhance mathematical reasoning through AI-powered instruction evolution and step-level supervision.
extraction_data.application: Mathematical problem solving, chain-of-thought reasoning, instruction following
extraction_data.research_problem: Mathematical reasoning in large language models
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning with Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)
extraction_data.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

extraction_data.innovation: WizardMath introduces Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF), which combines MathEvol-Instruct and process supervision to iteratively evolve math instructions and improve reasoning performance through reinforcement learning. The method leverages GPT-4 for automated process-level feedback, enabling efficient, high-quality training without human annotation.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (implied from context; not explicitly named)
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning with Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)
extraction_data.extension: Uses GPT-4 to automatically generate process-level supervision and instruction evolution, enabling scalable, AI-powered reinforcement learning without human labeling.
extraction_data.research_problem: Mathematical reasoning in large language models
extraction_data.application: Mathematical problem solving, chain-of-thought reasoning, instruction following, education (grade to high school level)
extraction_data.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

extraction_data.innovation: WizardMath-RL introduces a reinforced evolutionary instruction tuning framework that enhances mathematical reasoning by iteratively generating and refining high-quality math problems and solutions, enabling strong zero-shot and few-shot performance on mathematical benchmarks.
extraction_data.application: Mathematical reasoning, problem solving, instruction following, zero-shot and few-shot learning
extraction_data.research_problem: Mathematical reasoning in large language models
extraction_data.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct
